title: cupressus sempervirens subsp. horizontalis
intro: Cupressus sempervirens subsp. horizontalis, also known as Italian Stone Pine, is a coniferous evergreen plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its unique horizontal branches and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and improving respiratory function. Italian Stone Pine has been traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and essential oils, which are believed to have medicinal properties and promote overall well-being. The seeds of the plant are also edible and rich in nutrients, making them a valuable source of vitamins and minerals for a healthy diet.
